tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Trim; Remove at 115bp + Mine Clearance
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~128bp (Jun 26 est., -4bp; down from 195bp D93 peak; down from 139bp D109). Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23 Switzerland; Goldman Q4 Brent $80 forecast. Compression continues but pace slowing. Trim to 30-40% protection at 128bp. Remove fully only at confirmed mine clearance + physical Hormuz reopening (target 115-120bp). Stress scenario (25%): iTraxx settles 130-150bp. Tail scenario (8%): collapse spikes to 200-230bp. Hold residual hedge through mine-clearing completion (~Jul 19 per 30-day mandate). Do not fully exit before Ras Laffan restart late Aug 2026.
instruments: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS 5Y (trim to 50%)
Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS (hold)

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold; JKM Supply Lag Persists
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $18.86 (last confirmed Jun 12, TradingEconomics; carried). TTF €41.54 est. (Jun 26; down from €49.50 D93 peak). Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23; TTF eased further as nuclear talks progress. JKM held firm — physical supply lag widening the spread. Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing Day 7 of 30-day mandate (physical Hormuz reopening late-2026). JKM cannot normalise until Ras Laffan restarts + P&I clubs re-enter. Spread still wide; hold JKM long leg. Stop at confirmed Ras Laffan restart + mine clearance completion. Goldman Q4 Brent $80 forecast supports JKM relative outperformance vs crude.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

tradeIdeas.title: Long ASEAN Banks / Underweight ASEAN Energy Equities
tradeIdeas.rationale: Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23 Switzerland. iTraxx Asia IG ~128bp (Jun 26 est., -11bp from D109 139bp). ASEAN Banks ~218.0 idx (est., +2.1% Jun 26) continuing to benefit from spread compression and risk-on EM rotation. ASEAN Energy ~106.0 idx (est., -2.1%) faces Brent headwind ($75.04 Jun 25 confirmed, -24% from Jun 3 peak; Goldman Q4 $80). Add on energy weakness at 103-106 idx. Bank-energy divergence trade reinforced by Goldman normalization forecast. Stop on banks: iTraxx resurgence above 180bp or deal collapse (tail 8%).

tradeIdeas.title: Long PHP / Long IDR vs USD — Deal De-escalation EM FX Recovery
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~55.20 est. (Jun 26; -1.0%; -4.3% from D93 57.60). USD/IDR ~15,700 est. (Jun 26; -1.3%; -5.9% from D93 16,700). Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23; Goldman Q4 Brent $80 further eases ASEAN energy import bill. Philippines energy import bill falling with Brent $75.04 (-24% from Jun 3 peak); Indonesia ICP overshoot narrowing ($75.04 vs $70 budget = $5/bbl overshoot vs $40+ at peak). Continue to add: PHP and IDR both approaching targets. Target USD/PHP 54.50-55.00; USD/IDR 15,200-15,500 on confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Stop: deal collapse (USD/PHP back above 57.50; USD/IDR above 16,500).
instruments: ASEAN EM FX basket long vs USD

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~128bp (Jun 26 est., -67bp from D93 195bp peak). Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23 — compression window is live and accelerating. Execute residual refinancing immediately: spread at 128bp and heading toward 115-120bp target on mine clearance. Nuclear sequencing risk remains (stress target 130-150bp). Goldman Q4 $80 Brent forecast supports further compression. Tail 200-230bp on collapse (8%). Act now — window 2-3 weeks before nuclear sequencing uncertainty re-widens.

Brent $75.04 (Jun 25 confirmed, TradingEconomics, -24% from D93 peak); THB ~31.00 est. (-6.4% from D93 33.10); Thailand 10Y ~1.90% est. (-35bp from D93 2.25%). Goldman Q4 Brent $80 — PTTEP EBITDA trough near. USD H2 prefunding window open with THB strengthening further on roadmap progress. Execute before nuclear sequencing dispute restarts. Stress Brent $80-95 (25%): adequate EBITDA. Tail Brent $110-130 (8%): add protection.

iTraxx Asia IG ~128bp (Jun 26 est., -11bp from D109); USD/SGD ~1.2250 est. (-2.8% from D93 1.2670). Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23 — compression window accelerating. Extend revolving credit within 3 weeks: 128bp heading toward 115bp target. SGD strengthening on risk-on further reduces USD hedge cost. Tail scenario (8%) poses 200+bp risk — do not defer past Jul 2026 when mine-clearing mandate expires.

ASEAN HY ~460bp (Jun 26 est., -120bp from D93 580bp). Brent $75.04 (Jun 25 confirmed, -24% from D93). Roadmap agreed Jun 22-23 — desalination power cost pressure easing further. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms within 3-4 weeks: 460bp window is live. Nuclear sequencing dispute could re-widen HY if implementation stalls. Tail (8%): ASEAN HY back to 580-620bp. Stress (25%): stabilises 470-510bp. Act before Jul 19 mine-clearing deadline.
